name: Ring of Fire
desc: A golden ring with a fiery red stone in the center.

name: Scaled Body Armor
desc: An unusual looking suit of armor created from crimson red scales.

name: Draconic Sword
desc: An enchanted sword forged from an ancient metal.

name: Bright Blazing Pure Relic
desc: A relic used for good with a brightly blazing flame inside.

name: Shadowy Blazing Corrupted Relic
desc: A relic corrupted by dark magic with a shadowy blazing flame inside.
